title: Emergency Shelter Clearinghouses * Domestic Violence Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Emergency Shelter Clearinghouses * Domestic Violence Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Domestic Violence Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CALL TO SAFETY SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter list with bed availability for domestic violence shelters. Not all shelters are listed. Shelter access is dependent on available bed space and is not guaranteed. The agency does not maintain waitlists. Provides referrals for a Safety and Stabilization Assessment (SSA) for domestic violence shelters or housing resources. SSA is required before accessing most direct domestic violence services. PO Box 42610 Portland, OR 97242 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic and/or sexual violence, stalking, sex trafficking, or sex industry workers that are currently needing to flee a dangerous situation and have no safe place to stay for the night. Domestic and/or sexual violence must have occurred within the last six months. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 235-5333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CALL TO SAFETY SHELTER SERVICES
